name: Memory Graph
description: Persistent codebase knowledge graph that serves as a memory layer for AI agents. Pre-indexes code structure so agents never lose context across sessions. Powered by code-review-graph.

autoIndex.description: Automatically index the workspace on gateway start (default: true)

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from indexing (default: node_modules, .git, dist)

conversationMemory.description: Store conversation summaries in the graph for cross-session recall (default: true)
